

```{r include=FALSE}
rm(list = ls())
library(fontawesome)
library(vembedr)
library(tictoc)
tic()
```

```{r global_options, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
knitr::opts_chunk$set(fig.pos = "H", out.extra = "")
```


````{=html}
```{r, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
xfun::file_string('8 contact.html')
```
````

<!-- {{< fa thumbs-up >}}  -->
<!-- {{< fa folder >}} -->
<!-- {{< fa chess-pawn >}} -->
<!-- {{< fa brands bluetooth >}} -->
<!-- {{< fa brands twitter size=2xl >}} -->
<!-- {{< fa brands github size=5x >}} -->
<!-- {{< fa battery-half size=Huge >}} -->
<!-- {{< fa envelope title="An envelope" >}} -->

```{r introduction, child = 'welcome.qmd'}
```


```{r overview, child = 'course-overview.qmd'}
```


```{r data science, child = 'tools-data-science.qmd'}
```


```{r activities, child = 'course-activities.qmd'}
```


```{r evaluation, child = 'evaluation.qmd'}
```


```{r rubrics, child = 'rubrics.qmd'}
```


```{r policies, child = 'course-policies.qmd'}
```


```{r check, child = 'checklist.qmd'}
```


```{r schedule, child = 'schedule.qmd'}
```


```{r resources, child = 'learning-resources.qmd'}
```


```{r internet-resources, child = 'internet-resources.qmd'}
```

```{r include=FALSE}
a <- toc()
```


This document took `r round(as.numeric((a$toc-a$tic)), 2)` seconds to compile in Quarto version `r quarto::quarto_version()`, and `r R.version.string`.


# `r fontawesome::fa("book-open")` References. {.unnumbered}
::: {#refs}
:::
